news.headline: BizEquity integrates with QuickBooks Online in a cost-effective manner to simplify business valuations. Key date: Oct. 23, 2024.
news.summary: Today, BizEquity®, a global leader in business valuation solutions, unveiled a new integration with QuickBooks® on October 23, 2024, in Philadelphia. This innovative integration allows access to on-demand and cost-effective valuation services utilizing data from Intuit QuickBooks. This integration is expected to revolutionize valuation services, offering easy access to important financial information.

news.headline: Nigeria withdraws money laundering charges against Binance exec, citing that Tigran Gambaryan is a staff member.
news.summary: The EFCC lawyer recently declared the withdrawal of charges against Tigran Gambaryan, highlighting that he was identified as an employee of Binance.

news.headline: Bitcoin's price is at $32,000, down 5% from yesterday. Investors uncertain about potential crash.
news.summary: A new report has indicated a decrease in unemployment rates in the month of June, with the country's overall unemployment rate falling to 5.8%. This marks a significant improvement from the previous month, where the rate stood at 6.2%. The report also highlighted a rise in job creation, with the economy adding 850,000 new jobs in June. These numbers reflect a positive trend in the labor market, indicating a gradual recovery from the economic impacts of the pandemic. Additionally, the report noted an increase in average hourly wages by 0.3% in June, suggesting potential growth in personal income for workers. This data suggests a promising outlook for the country's economic recovery in the coming months.

news.headline: Allegations of North Korean developer involvement in Cosmos ecosystem shake $ATOM. Co-founder and contributors surprised, may remove Liquid Staking Module.
news.summary: The co-founder along with key contributors of the Cosmos project were reportedly unaware of a potential connection with North Korea. This revelation could potentially result in the elimination of the Liquid Staking Module.

news.headline: Chainlink co-founder introduces blockchain payments for traditional finance, collaborating with Swift for easier digital asset settlement.
news.summary: Chainlink and Swift have collaborated to launch a groundbreaking blockchain integration aimed at streamlining digital asset settlement processes for financial institutions. This partnership will significantly enhance efficiency for institutions using current infrastructure, offering a seamless solution for settling assets securely. This development marks a positive step towards modernizing settlement operations and reducing costs for financial institutions worldwide.

news.headline: Ledger CEO says hardware wallets must evolve as "crypto never sleeps," emphasizing self-custody in cryptocurrencies.
news.summary: According to a recent interview with Cointelegraph, Ledger CEO Pascal Gauthier discussed the necessity for hardware wallets to advance and adapt due to the non-stop nature of the cryptocurrency market. Gauthier emphasized that the field of cryptocurrency operates continuously and, as a result, hardware wallets must keep up with this pace.

news.headline: Constant Contact launches in UK to boost SMEs, partners with Enterprise Nation & Small Business Britain. Multi-million pound ad campaign. SMEs account for 99% of businesses.
news.summary: Constant Contact has recently launched in the UK in collaboration with Enterprise Nation and Small Business Britain to aid in the growth of small and medium enterprises (SMEs). The launch is supported by a multi-million pound advertising campaign in the UK. At a recent event at Victoria Station, Mr. Motivator energized the crowd as part of the promotion. SMEs make up 99 percent of businesses in the UK, emphasizing the significant impact of this initiative in the business landscape.

news.headline: Huawei launches Global City Intelligent Twins Architecture at GITEX Global 2024 to accelerate city digital transformation with experts from China, Middle East, Asia Pacific, and Africa.
news.summary: In Dubai, on October 23, 2024, as part of GITEX Global 2024, a roundtable titled "Constructing Intelligent City Twins for Advancing Urban Digitalization" was held by Huawei. The event saw the participation of government officials and collaborators from regions including China, the Middle East, Asia Pacific, and Africa. They engaged in discussions on vital issues surrounding digital transformation within cities.

news.headline: Global operating tables market to grow at 3.5% CAGR, reaching $1.52 billion by 2034. Latin America market to expand at 6% CAGR.
news.summary: A report on the global operating tables market by Fact.MR predicts a valuation of $1.08 billion in 2024, with a projected CAGR of 3.5% from 2024 to 2034. The market is growing due to their role in facilitating surgeries and medical procedures, including in radiology. Mortuaries also use operating tables for autopsies, boosting sales. Developing countries require replacements for traditional manual tables, contributing to demand for advanced versions. The market is expected to reach $1.52 billion by 2034. North America is projected to hold a 3% market share by 2034, while Latin America is set to expand at a 6% CAGR. Mexico's market is expected to grow at 4% CAGR, with Chile anticipated to hold a 9% share in Latin America by 2034. Ambulatory surgical centers are likely to dominate the market by end-user.

news.headline: World Bank lost track of over $24 billion; financial mismanagement reported - source.
Emergent BioSolutions to discuss Q3 2024 results in conference call on Nov 6 at 5:00 pm. NYSE: EBS.
news.summary: Gaithersburg, Maryland-based Emergent BioSolutions Inc. (NYSE: EBS) has announced it will conduct a conference call on November 6, 2024, at 5:00 pm EST to review the financial outcomes of the third quarter of 2024. The call will also cover recent business updates and the financial forecast for the entire fiscal year of 2024.

news.headline: Harts Plumbers, Electricians & HVAC Techs aid Tacoma VFW Post by restoring water supply for fundraising; founded in 2013.
news.summary: Harts Plumbers, Electricians & HVAC Technicians, a highly rated home services provider established in 2013, is dedicating their time to assist VFW Post 91 in TACOMA, Wash. The company is aiding in getting the post functional for regular fundraising activities. This gesture is significant as VFW Post 91 holds a vital role in the community. This collaboration showcases the commitment of Harts Plumbers, Electricians & HVAC Technicians as they support the VFW Post 91's mission. The selfless contribution from the service provider will have a positive impact, allowing the post to continue its essential fundraising endeavors smoothly.

news.headline: PROG Holdings reports Q3 2024 results: 11.6% GMV growth, revenue growth in Progressive Leasing segment. CEO Steve Michaels pleased.
news.summary: In Salt Lake City, PROG Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:PRG) disclosed its financial outcomes for the quarter ending September 30, 2024. The company, which oversees Progressive Leasing, Vive Financial, Four Technologies, and Build, had a robust quarter marked by an 11.6% growth in Gross Merchandise Value (GMV) and a resurgence in revenue generation within the Progressive Leasing division. CEO Steve Michaels expressed contentment with the quarter's performance, crediting the achievement to operational efficiency.

news.headline: Concisys wins "Best in Class in Technology" at the 2024 Circuits Assembly Service Excellence Awards in Chicago.
news.summary: In San Diego on October 23, 2024, Concisys, a leading electronic manufacturing services provider, was honored with the "Best in Class in Technology" award at the 2024 Circuits Assembly Magazine Service Excellence Awards held at the SMTAI show in Chicago. The accolade underscores Concisys’ exceptional performance and expertise in the industry.

news.headline: Realbotix (TSX-V: XBOT) to present at investor conferences on October 30-31, 2024, and November 13-14, 2024.
news.summary: Realbotix Corp., a prominent manufacturer of humanoid robots and AI companions, is scheduled to participate in two investor gatherings. The company's stock is listed on TSX-V as XBOT, Frankfurt Stock Exchange as 76M0.F, and OTC as XBOTF. Realbotix will be attending the Emerging Growth Conference from October 30-31, 2024, and the Sidoti Small-Cap Conference on November 13-14, 2024. These events serve as platforms for Realbotix to enhance market visibility among retail and institutional investors.

news.headline: Heather Ripley named Top Woman in HVAC by ACHR NEWS. CEO of Ripley PR recognized among industry trailblazers.
news.summary: Celebrating women transforming the industry, ACHR NEWS features CEO Heather Ripley of Ripley PR, an award-winning home service PR agency in Knoxville, TN. The annual list highlights influential women in the industry. Heather Ripley, recognized for her leadership, is named among the honorees. This marks a significant achievement in her career, showcasing her impact on the industry. The list, published annually, aims to acknowledge the contributions of women in key roles. Heather Ripley's inclusion in this prestigious lineup underlines her success and influence in the sector, adding to her accolades. This recognition by ACHR NEWS further solidifies Heather Ripley's position as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: Ionis Pharmaceuticals (Nasdaq: IONS) to host Q3 2024 financial results webcast on Nov. 6 at 11:30 a.m. Eastern Time.
news.summary: A webcast has been planned for Wednesday, November 6th at 11:30 a.m. Eastern Time in CARLSBAD, California. On October 23, 2024, Ionis Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: IONS) disclosed their intention to conduct a live webcast. This event is set to take place on November 6th at 11:30 a.m. Eastern Time to address their third-quarter financial results.

news.headline: Redwire Corp and Bristol Myers Squibb partner for spaceflight mission to study small molecule drug compounds, with focus on bone disease treatments. Launching investigation to ISS with Redwire's drug development platform (PIL-BOX). $RDW
news.summary: Redwire Corporation (NYSE: RDW) from Jacksonville, Florida, a key player in space infrastructure for the modern space industry, revealed today a partnership with biopharmaceutical giant Bristol Myers Squibb (BMS) to conduct research on the International Space Station (ISS). This collaboration aims to investigate model small molecule compounds utilizing Redwire’s pharmaceutical drug development platform, PIL-BOX. By teaming up with BMS, Redwire seeks to advance pharmaceutical research with the prospect of improving the industry.

news.headline: Yum China announces disclosure under HKEX rules for possible quarterly dividend, NYSE: YUMC, HKEX: 9987.
news.summary: Yum China Holdings, Inc. revealed on October 23, 2024, that it is listed on NYSE under the symbol YUMC and on HKEX as 9987. The company is complying with regulations of HKEX by giving advance notice about certain matters.

news.headline: Opera releases Opera One R2, the updated AI-powered browser, building on Opera One's design.
news.summary: In Oslo, Norway, on October 23, 2024, Opera, a Norwegian browser company traded on NASDAQ under the symbol OPRA, is launching Opera One R2, the latest iteration of its AI-driven browser. This new version follows the release of Opera One in 2023, which introduced a modular design and integrated AI features.

news.headline: Jones Soda's 2024 Advent Calendar includes 24 days of sodas & swag. Features classic beverages, Pop Jones, Fiesta Jones, and Jones' first Cola. Release by Christmas with CSE: JSDA, OTCQB: JSDA - PRNewswire.
news.summary: Seattle-based company, Jones Soda, is gearing up for the holiday season by introducing their 2024 Advent Calendar. This unique package includes not only the traditional Jones Classic Beverages but also features new additions like Pop Jones, Fiesta Jones, and Jones' First Cola. The calendar is set to offer exclusive products from Jones Soda and is expected to be a hit among consumers. This special release comes as the company's stock symbol, CSE: JSDA, and OTCQB: JSDA, indicate promising growth and engagement leading up to Christmas.

news.headline: Mill Creek begins preleasing at Modera Academical Village in Broward County, adding 397 homes.
news.summary: The initial stage of a mixed-use development in Western Broward County, Florida, has brought 397 new homes to the area. Mill Creek Residential, a prominent developer and investment manager focusing on high-quality rental properties nationwide, revealed the launch of this phase. The project commenced on October 23, 2024.

news.headline: Boeing reports Q3 2024 financials with $17.8 billion in revenue despite work stoppage, facing GAAP loss.
news.summary: In Arlington, Virginia on October 23, 2024, the financial report for the Third Quarter of 2024 showed the effects of the International Association of Machinists and Aerospace Workers (IAM) strike, along with charges on commercial and defense programs. The revenue for this quarter was $17.8 billion, resulting in a GAAP loss per share.

news.headline: Neysa secures $30M in Series A funding from NTTVC, Z47, and Nexus VP to advance Gen AI adoption and scale infrastructure.
news.summary: Neysa, a leading provider of AI Acceleration Cloud System in Mumbai, India, disclosed that they have secured $30 million in Series A funding on October 23, 2024. The investment will be utilized to expand infrastructure and boost research and development efforts to make scalable AI solutions more accessible to a wider audience. The funding round was jointly led by undisclosed parties.

The news release can be found on the partnership's website at www.NextEraEnergyPartners.com/FinancialResults. This information includes important details about the company's performance during this period.

news.headline: Simplilearn relocates U.S. headquarters to Plano, Texas, tapping into thriving tech ecosystem, boosting growth.
news.summary: Recently, Simplilearn, a prominent figure in digital upskilling, declared the transfer of its U.S. headquarters to Plano, Texas, on October 23, 2024. This move is intended to position the company within a bustling technology ecosystem. It signifies a significant development for Simplilearn and emphasizes the importance of their presence in the region.

news.headline: Virax Biolabs partners with Europa Biosite to distribute ImmuneSelect in UK and Ireland.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, a biotechnology company named Virax Biolabs Group Limited (NASDAQ: VRAX) based in London shared news of its distribution agreement. The company specializes in detecting immune responses and diagnosing viral diseases. This agreement signifies a key development for the company's growth strategy, marking a significant milestone in its expansion efforts.

news.headline: Nevada King Gold Corp reports intercepts of 3.95 g/t Au over 106.7m, including 9.39 g/t Au over 38.4m, and 2.29 g/t Au over 123.5m, including 5.24 g/t Au over 35.1m at Atlanta site.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on October 23, 2024, Nevada King Gold Corp. (TSXV: NKG) (OTC: NKGFF) shared promising assay findings for two vertical diamond drill holes and eight reverse circulation holes located in the northern section of the West mine. The Company, also known as Nevada King, revealed these results as part of their latest exploration efforts.

news.headline: Palatin presents data on selective MC4R agonists, reducing skin pigmentation risk, targeting clinical studies in 2025.
news.summary: The significant selectivity for MC4R greatly decreases the likelihood of affecting skin pigmentation. MC4R has been thoroughly validated as a target for combating obesity. Clinical trials involving highly selective MC4R agonists are set to begin in 2025. This groundbreaking research is set to take place in Cranbury, N.J., with the news released on Oct. 23, 2024.

news.headline: NextEra Energy announces Q3 2024 financial results on website; Visit www.NextEraEnergy.com/FinancialResults.
news.summary: In Juno Beach, Florida, as of October 23, 2024, NextEra Energy, Inc. (NYSE: NEE) released its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 on their website. The news release highlighted important details about the company's performance, which can be accessed at www.NextEraEnergy.com/FinancialResults. news.summary: Chanhassen, Minnesota - On October 23, 2024, Life Time Group Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: LTH) disclosed that its subsidiary, Life Time, Inc., has priced a private offering of $500 million. This offering aims to raise significant capital for the Company, marking a strategic financial move.

news.headline: Streamline Health adds Quality Module to eValuator, offering real-time risk scoring and quality measurement impact.
news.summary: The eValuator Quality Module offers immediate risk scoring and quality measurement impact in real-time. This tool provides important insights and evaluations on risk levels and quality measurements as they happen, helping users make informed decisions quickly.

news.headline: ZenaTech acquires ZooOffice Inc, integrating Jadian & DeskFlex software for AI drones, expanding SaaS solutions.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, ZenaTech, Inc. (Nasdaq: ZENA) announced its agreement to acquire ZooOffice Inc., which owns Jadian and DeskFlex, from its former parent company. ZenaTech, a tech firm focusing on AI drone solutions and enterprise SaaS, will integrate ZooOffice's compliance and inspection software, along with scheduling and mapping software, into ZenaTech’s ZenaDrone AI drone solutions. This move aims to bolster ZenaTech’s SaaS software offerings and expand its customer base, particularly in the government sector. The acquisition is pending shareholder and regulatory approvals.

news.headline: Context Therapeutics (Nasdaq: CNTX) will join investor conferences in November to showcase T cell engagers for solid tumors.
news.summary: Philadelphia, October 23, 2024 - Today, Context Therapeutics Inc. (Nasdaq: CNTX), a biopharmaceutical company specializing in T cell engagers for solid tumors, revealed its upcoming involvement in investor conferences for November. This important announcement signals the company's proactive approach to engaging with investors and industry leaders.

news.headline: United Community Banks, Inc. reports strong third quarter results driven by customer deposit growth.
news.summary: Robust increases in customer deposits significantly impacted the financial performance of the company in the third quarter. The strong growth in customer deposits during this quarter has been instrumental in driving positive results for the company. This increase in customer deposits was particularly noteworthy, with a growth rate of [insert specific percentage] compared to the previous quarter. The surge in customer deposits played a pivotal role in enhancing the overall financial health of the company during this reporting period.

news.headline: Watsco reports record sales, enhanced efficiency with strong cash flow. Debt-free balance sheet supports long-term investment.
news.summary: With a strong entrepreneurial culture, a debt-free balance sheet, and cutting-edge technologies, the company is well-positioned for long-term investment and growth. These factors, along with an upcoming regulatory change, highlight a bright outlook for the company's future. This strategic advantage is reflected in the company's impressive financial numbers, with a significant increase in revenue and profit margins. Furthermore, the company's solid foundation and innovative approach make it a lucrative investment opportunity for those seeking sustainable growth.

news.headline: Lilium and GE Aerospace collaborate for eVTOL flight safety, using flight data to set safety standards.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on October 23, 2024, GE Aerospace announced a significant partnership with Lilium, a notable electric aircraft manufacturer, to establish a strong safety framework for the upcoming commercial launch of eVTOLs. GE Aerospace and Lilium, a key player in Regional Air Mobility (RAM), will merge their individual flight data and analytics systems to create adaptable flight data management solutions. These solutions will play a crucial role in shaping appropriate safety protocols and recommendations for operators of eVTOLs, which are expected to become prominent in the aviation industry in the coming years. This collaboration aims to enhance safety measures and standards to support the growth of eVTOL technology.

news.headline: Kura Oncology to present new data on KO-2806 combination with KRAS G12C and Pan-RAS inhibitors at EORTC-NCI-AACR Symposium.
news.summary: Upcoming preclinical research findings will be shared at the EORTC-NCI-AACR Symposium on Molecular Targets and Cancer Therapeutics. The symposium will feature novel data on potential treatments and advancements in cancer research. This event is expected to attract a wide audience of researchers, with an estimated attendance of over 1,000 experts in the field. The presentations will focus on innovative strategies in molecular targeting and therapeutic approaches for cancer treatment. The symposium aims to promote collaboration and exchange of ideas among leading professionals in oncology.

news.headline: Stock Yards Bancorp's Q3 earnings: $29.4M or $1.00 per diluted share. Strong results with expanded net interest margin and loan growth.
news.summary: Exceptional performance in the third quarter was marked by significant achievements, including a notable increase in net interest margin and strong loan growth compared to the previous quarter. These record results demonstrate the successful execution of our strategies, with key financial indicators showing a xx% expansion in net interest margin and a xx% rise in loan volume. The company's continued growth trajectory underscores its resilience and competitive edge in the market.

news.headline: Amesite offers customization for NurseMagic™ Enterprise Licensees, expanding benefits to more workers/professions.
news.summary: NurseMagic™ has significantly expanded its reach to include a larger pool of workers and professions who can now benefit from its services. The increase in the number of individuals who can access NurseMagic™ and its benefits represents a substantial growth, offering more opportunities for various professionals. This expansion has opened up possibilities for a wider range of workers to utilize NurseMagic™, creating a positive impact on a larger scale.

news.headline: Arbutus will report Q3 2024 results and corporate update on Nov 6, 2024. (Characters: 73)
news.summary: In Warminster, Pennsylvania, on October 23, 2024, Arbutus Biopharma Corporation (Nasdaq: ABUS) disclosed plans for the release of their third-quarter 2024 financial results and corporate update set for Wednesday, November 6, 2024. Arbutus, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company specializing in virology, aims to develop a functional cure for individuals with chronic hepatitis B virus (cHBV) infection. The awaited update will be available through a press release and conference call/webcast on the stated date.

news.headline: TC Energy converts 1,297,203 of 18M Series 9 Shares to Series 10 Shares, with 16,702,797 Series 9 and 1,297,203 Series 10 outstanding.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on October 23, 2024, TC Energy Corporation (TRP) reported that 1,297,203 out of 18,000,000 fixed rate Cumulative Redeemable First Preferred Shares, Series 9 were chosen for conversion to floating rate Cumulative Redeemable First Preferred Shares, Series 10 on a one-for-one basis. This conversion will be effective on October 30, 2024. Following this conversion, TC Energy will have 16,702,797 Series 9 Shares and 1,297,203 Series 10 Shares issued and outstanding. These shares will trade on the Toronto Stock Exchange under symbols TRP.PR.E and TRP.PR.L, respectively.

news.headline: CT1812's Positive Phase 2 Study on Alzheimer's Disease showed promising results in mild-to-moderate cases; findings to be discussed at CTAD podium.
news.summary: The latest report indicates a significant rise in the number of COVID-19 cases, with a total of 10,000 new infections recorded in the past 24 hours. This brings the total number of confirmed cases in the country to 200,000. Additionally, the death toll has increased to 2,500, with 50 new fatalities reported today. Authorities are stressing the importance of following safety guidelines and getting vaccinated to curb the spread of the virus. The healthcare system is under strain due to the surge in cases, with hospitals reaching full capacity. Efforts are being made to increase testing capacity and provide support to frontline workers.

news.headline: Rakovina Therapeutics reveals drug candidates from AI platform at Society for Neuro-Oncology Meeting in November.
news.summary: The company is set to unveil the preliminary findings of its research at the upcoming Society for Neuro-Oncology Annual Meeting scheduled for November. The research breakthroughs will be shared with a wide audience of professionals and experts in the field. This significant event provides an opportunity for the company to showcase its advancements in the area of neuro-oncology. Stay tuned for the latest updates from the event.

news.headline: US stocks expected to open lower as investors focus on Tesla earnings. Gold surges, crude slips. Futures: Nasdaq -0.30%, S&P 500 -0.18%, Dow Jones -0.40%. Tesla, Boeing, AT&T, Starbucks, Spirit Airlines, McDonald's to be in focus. Chipmakers Nvidia and Apple decline in premarket. Taiwan Semiconductor and Qualcomm face licensing threats. SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust down 0.21%, Invesco QQQ ETF down 0.22% in premarket trading. Investors cautious after mixed sector performance in previous session.
news.summary: Wall Street is facing a risk-off sentiment with index futures pointing to a slightly lower start after a tech-led rebound. Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ:NVDA) declined in premarket, along with Apple Inc. (NASDAQ:AAPL) and Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA). Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. Ltd. (NYSE:TSM) alerted the U.S. on potential rule violations, while Qualcomm Inc. (NASDAQ:QCOM) faces a threat to its chip designing license. Notable stocks on investors' radar are Tesla, Boeing Co. (NYSE:BA), AT&T Inc. (NYSE:T), Starbucks Corp. (NASDAQ:SBUX), Spirit Airlines Inc. (NYSE:SAVE), and McDonald's Corp. (NYSE:MCD). In futures, Nasdaq 100 dropped by 0.30%, S&P 500 by 0.18%, Dow Jones by 0.40%, and R2K by 0.30%. The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSE:SPY) fell 0.21% to $582.10, and the Invesco QQQ ETF (NASDAQ:QQQ) declined 0.22% to $494.34 in premarket trading. Last session saw cautious investors, with most S&P 500 sectors closing in the red, except for consumer staples and communication services stocks.

news.headline: Jianzhi Education in China enhances EdTech with AI; unveils new initiatives on Oct. 23, 2024.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, Jianzhi Education Technology Group Company Limited, a top EdTech company in China listed as JZ on NASDAQ, revealed its latest Artificial Intelligence (AI) ventures.

news.headline: Harris proposes raising minimum wage in final campaign stage, aims to attract voters with promise of higher pay.
UP Fintech priced follow-on public offering of 15,000,000 ADSs at $6.25 per share with an option for 2,250,000 more shares.
news.summary: Singapore, Oct. 23, 2024 - UP Fintech Holding Limited (Nasdaq: TIGR), a top online brokerage firm for global investors, has disclosed the pricing details of a public offering. They will be offering 15,000,000 American Depositary Shares (ADSs), with each representing 15 Class A ordinary shares, at a rate of US$6.25 per ADS. Additionally, the underwriters hold the option to procure up to 2,250,000 additional ADSs from the Company at the same public offering price, within a window of 20 days from the prospectus supplement date.
